options.name: -for_partition
options.description: Specify this option for partition fence generation. For power domain fence generation by default.

options.name: -hInst
options.description: specifies list of hinst names. Create new fence for specified hInsts

options.name: -inst_group
options.description: specifies list of inst group names. Create new fence for specified groups

options.name: -module
options.description: specifies list of cell names. Create new fence for hInsts with specified cell name

options.name: -target_util
options.description: Specify fence target utilization. Default: Core Utilization.
